summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 2 e-commerce features completed successfully. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed - 100% success rate) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Store checkout, order management, CRM, content export, and analytics all validated.

design_issues.issue: Admin button click has overlay interception issue
design_issues.note: Minor UI issue - functionality works but requires force click

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (20/20 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Orders management: Create order, get orders, update status, filter by status
Customers CRM: List customers, view customer details modal, order history
Store public page: Product display, checkout modal, form validation, total calculation
Store checkout flow: Customer form, quantity selection, price calculation
Export functionality: TikTok scripts export (6595 chars), DM scripts export (1020 chars)
Products analytics: Performance metrics for all 6 products
Navigation: All Phase 2 routes working (Orders, Customers, Store)
Trust badges and security indicators on store page
Responsive design and proper styling maintained
Sidebar navigation with new Phase 2 menu items
Customer details modal with order history
